name: @justanarthur/just-github-actions-n-workflows-cli
description: Release automation toolkit — version bumping, npm publishing, docker publishing, VPS deployment via GitHub Actions composite actions

scripts.build: bun build src/commands/init.ts src/commands/update.ts src/commands/status.ts --outdir dist/commands --target node --format esm --splitting --minify --sourcemap=none --external @oclif/core --external @inquirer/prompts
